content: This report summarizes the findings of the investigation into the kidnapping of Arjun Mehta. Key contradictions have been identified: 1) The blue jacket witness account is false; CCTV shows black attire. 2) The ₹20 lakh withdrawal receipt is forged, printed on Vikram’s printer by Priya Mehta. 3) The burner phone was purchased by Ramesh Kumar, not Bittu Singh. 4) The motorcycle was returned to the pawnshop by Ramesh Kumar on October 16. 5) GPS on Arjun’s watch was disabled by Ramesh Kumar using his old tracker device. 6) The ransom note ink does not match government printers — it matches Vikram’s office. 7) Two deleted calls from Vikram to Rohan indicate prior contact. 8) Priya Mehta’s DNA on Arjun’s bag suggests direct contact on the morning of the kidnapping. 9) Manoj Verma, recently terminated for exposing Vikram’s illegal land deals, has no alibi for 14:30-15:30 on October 15. 10) Ramesh Kumar’s alibi (TV logs) is fabricated — the TV was turned on remotely at 17:05. Based on the evidence, the prime suspects are Manoj Verma (primary perpetrator), Ramesh Kumar (accomplice), and Priya Mehta (forensic facilitator). The motive is revenge for Manoj’s termination and financial gain. Bittu Singh and Rohan Mehta are innocent, framed. The case has been escalated to the Special Task Force for further tracking of the escape route to Ballabhgarh.
